title: Hornet Removal in Somers, NY | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Somers, Westchester. Safe nest elimination for homes and businesses. Licensed experts serving Somers, NY. Call today for $350-$550 service.
intro: Hornets pose a serious threat to Somers residents, particularly around the scenic properties near Muscoot Reservoir and the many wooded residential areas throughout this northern Westchester community. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, safe hornet removal services to protect your family and property from aggressive nests. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges of hornet infestations in Somers' mix of rural estates and suburban neighborhoods.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Westchester County, with specialized knowledge of hornet behavior in Somers' varied terrain. Our licensed technicians use proven removal methods and protective equipment to safely eliminate nests while offering competitive pricing and same-day emergency service for urgent situations.
localContext: Somers' combination of wooded properties, historic farms, and spacious residential lots creates ideal nesting conditions for hornets, especially in barns, sheds, and the eaves of homes near areas like Heritage Hills and Lincolndale. The town's many older structures and proximity to nature preserves mean hornets often establish large colonies in attics, garages, and outdoor structures throughout the community.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Somers?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for Somers residents. Emergency hornet removal is typically completed within 24 hours of your call, with most treatments taking 1-2 hours depending on nest size and location.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our service includes complete nest inspection, safe removal using professional-grade products, nest disposal, and a follow-up visit if needed. Pricing varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and height requirements for removal.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets in Somers?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved treatments and professional protective equipment to ensure safe removal. We advise keeping family and pets indoors during treatment, and the area is typically safe within 2-4 hours after service completion.

faqs.question: Do you service all areas of Somers including rural properties?
faqs.answer: Yes, we service all of Somers, NY, including rural areas near Muscoot Farm, Heritage Hills, Lincolndale, and surrounding neighborhoods. Our team is equipped to handle hornet nests on large properties, farms, and estates throughout the Somers area.
